name: .op

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional report style: ALL, BRIEF, CURRENT, DEBUG, NONE, VOLTAGE.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Optional time(s) for reporting during transient (with ALL/VOLTAGE/CURRENT/DEBUG).

dialectNotes: HSPICE often prints bias automatically with other analyses; use .OP when you only need the operating point, or to request a formatted report at specific times.
